title: Mailchimp Content Style Guide
summary: Operational voice, tone and editorial mechanics with boundaries and examples.
lessons: Separate durable voice from risk- and emotion-dependent tone.
caveats: Classic guidance may outlive current product strategy; date and scope each extraction.
licenseNote: Public guidance; quote sparingly and attribute.
antiImitationNote: Do not copy Mailchimp humor, voice or examples into another brand.
